<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PhpParser\Node\Expr; use PhpParser\Node\Expr; class ArrayDimFetch extends Expr { /** @var Expr Variable */ public Expr $var; /** @var null|Expr Array index / dim */ public ?Expr $dim; /** * Constructs an array index fetch node. * * @param Expr $var Variable * @param null|Expr $dim Array index / dim * @param array<string, mixed> $attributes Additional attributes */ public function __construct(Expr $var, ?Expr $dim = null, array $attributes = []) { $this->attributes = $attributes; $this->var = $var; $this->dim = $dim; } public function getSubNodeNames(): array { return ['var', 'dim']; } public function getType(): string { return 'Expr_ArrayDimFetch'; } }
